title: Everything Gives XP
description: Actions such as taming, smelting, etc. now give XP
body:
# Everything, ranging from crafting to taming, gives you xp!

 

**Use /gamerule BreakingBlocksGivesXp to get a little bit of xp for breaking blocks**

 

**Current new ways of getting xp:**

- Breaking blocks (toggleable)
- Using Bonemeal
- Crafting
- Smelting
- Landing critical hits
- Sleeping
- Trees growing
- Fishing
- Taming mobs
- Using a totem
- Being struck by lightning
- Blocking
- Entering the end
- New cleric trades
- Anchievements
- Entering the nether for the first time
 
**Armour:**

- Lapis set - each piece gives xp over time

**Other:**
- Compact xp - A throwable xp orb made from 9 xp bottles
- Liquid xp - Standing in this will summon xp orbs
